name: lidltool-desktop
description: Electron side-app scaffold for one-time retailer scrapes and local analysis

scripts.vendor:sync: node ./scripts/sync-vendor.mjs && npm run vendor:patch-frontend && npm run vendor:validate-frontend && npm run frontend:install && npm run vendor:patch-backend && npm run i18n:sync-shell
scripts.frontend:build: npm run vendor:patch-frontend && npm run vendor:validate-frontend && npm --prefix ./vendor/frontend run build
scripts.dev: npm run i18n:sync-shell && npm run icons:generate && electron-vite dev
scripts.dev:full: npm run vendor:sync && npm run frontend:install && npm run backend:prepare && npm run frontend:build && electron-vite dev
scripts.build: npm run vendor:patch-backend && npm run frontend:build && npm run i18n:sync-shell && npm run assets:sync && npm run icons:generate && electron-vite build
scripts.build:full-ui: npm run frontend:install && npm run build
scripts.test:ocr-packaged: npm run build && npm run verify:ocr-packaged
scripts.test:e2e:prepare: npm run backend:prepare && npm run frontend:build && npm run build
scripts.test:e2e:full: npm run test:e2e:prepare && npm run test:e2e
scripts.test:runtime-contracts: node --test --experimental-strip-types tests/runtime-contract.test.ts tests/runtime-cli-args.test.ts tests/runtime-backup-artifacts.test.ts tests/runtime-paths.test.ts tests/sqlite-artifacts.test.ts tests/vendor-patchers.test.ts
scripts.dist:mac:signed: npm run backend:prepare && npm run build && electron-builder --mac
scripts.dist:with-backend: npm run backend:prepare && npm run build && CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder
scripts.dist:full: npm run vendor:sync && npm run backend:prepare && npm run build:full-ui && npm run verify:ocr-packaged && CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder
